---
title: "Phuse OS Pavilion - Block Party🎉"
format: 
  revealjs:
    footer: Phuse US Connect 2026 - OS Block Party
    transition: fade
    theme: serif
    chalkboard: true
revealjs-plugins:
  - codewindow
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(qrcode)

```

## What is the Block Party?

## RValidationHub

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="50%"}


Eli Miller

---

<div style="text-align: center;"> _Mission_ </div>

🚀 Our mission is to leverage the open-source and collaborative nature of R while supporting its adoption within the biopharmaceutical setting.

::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.codewindow style="font-size: 0.42em;"}

 _Current Projects_

```bash
riskmetric
val.meter
riskassessor
riskscore
```
:::

_How you can get involved_

``` {r, echo = FALSE}
generate_svg(
  qr_code("https://pharmar.org/community-meetings/"),
  size = 250,
  file = "images/qrcode.svg"
)
```

![](images/qrcode.svg)

::::

:::::

## Pharmaverse

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="50%"}


Ashley Tarasiewicz

Marcin Dubel

---

<div style="text-align: center;"> _Mission_ </div>

🚀 A connected network of companies and individuals working to promote collaborative development of currated open source R packages for clinical reporting usage in pharma.

::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.codewindow style="font-size: 0.42em;"}

 _Current Projects_

```bash
admiral
aNCA
autoslideR
cards
cardsx
chevron
clinify
connector
covtracer
datacutr
datasetjson
dataviewR
docorator
envsetup
ggsurvfit
gridify
gtsummary
logrx
metacore
metatools
pharmaRTF
pharmaverseADaM
pharmaverseraw
pharmaverseSDTM
pkglite
pypkglite
rhino
riskassessr
riskassessment
riskmetric
rlistings
rtables
rtflite
sdtm.oak
sdtmchecks
siera
teal
tern
tfrmt
tfrmtbuilder
tidyCDISC
tidytlg
Tplyr
valtools
whirl
xportr

```
:::

::::

:::::


## Pharmaverse - Get Involved

_How you can get involved_

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

``` {r, echo = FALSE}
generate_svg(
  qr_code("https://pharmaverse.org/"),
  size = 250,
  file = "images/pharmaverse_qr1.svg"
)
```

https://pharmaverse.org/

![](images/pharmaverse_qr1.svg)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

``` {r, echo = FALSE}
generate_svg(
  qr_code("https://pharmaverse.slack.com/"),
  size = 250,
  file = "images/pharmaverse_qr2.svg"
)
```

https://pharmaverse.slack.com/

![](images/pharmaverse_qr2.svg)

:::


::::


## CAMIS

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="50%"}


Becca Krouse

Lyn Taylor

Christina Fillmore

---

<div style="text-align: center;"> _Mission_ </div>

<div style="font-size:30px;">
🚀 CAMIS: Comparing Analysis Method Implementations in Software. Understand and Document analysis result discrepancies across software, demonstrate the statistical methodology through examples, document in an open GitHub repository.
</div>
::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.codewindow style="font-size: 0.42em;"}

 _Current Projects_

``` bash
- [Current Open issues](https://github.com/PSIAIMS/CAMIS/issues)
- [CAMIS - A PHUSE DVOST Working Group](https://psiaims.github.io/CAMIS/)

```
:::

_How you can get involved_

``` {r, echo = FALSE}
generate_svg(
  qr_code("https://psiaims.github.io/CAMIS/"),
  size = 250,
  file = "images/camis.svg"
)
```

[CAMIS - A PHUSE DVOST Working Group](https://psiaims.github.io/CAMIS/)

![](images/camis.svg)

::::

:::::

## Submissions Working Group

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="45%"}


Eric Nantz

Ben Straub

---

<div style="text-align: center;"> _Mission_ </div>

<div style="font-size:30px;">
🚀 Easier R-based clinical trial regulatory submissions today by showing open examples of using current submission portals. Easier R-based clinical trial regulatory submissions tomorrow by collecting feedback and influencing future industry and agency decisions on system/process setup.

</div>

::::

:::: {.column width="55%"}

::: {.codewindow style="font-size: 0.36em;"}

 _Current Projects_

``` bash
- Pilot 4 – Using webassembly and containers for submission
  packages to FDA is finishing up. Report coming soon
- Pilot 5 – Using datasetjson instead of xpts for
  submission packages to FDA is under review by FDA.
- Pilot 6 – Expansion of dataset and TLF programming for
  future submissions – in progress
- Pilot 7 – Creating new simulated datasets for future
  submissions and benchmarking – in progress
```
:::

_How you can get involved_

``` {r, echo = FALSE}
generate_svg(
  qr_code("https://rconsortium.github.io/submissions-wg/join.html/"),
  size = 250,
  file = "images/swg.svg"
)
```

[How to Join – R Submissions Working Group](https://rconsortium.github.io/submissions-wg/join.html/)

![](images/swg.svg)

::::

:::::

## CDISC

![](images/COSA1.png)

## CDISC

![](images/COSA2.png)

## Mixer

<div style="text-align: center;"> {{< countdown minutes=5 play_sound=true font-size="15rem" top=center right=center line-height=2  >}} </div>
